creator: celacunza@netscape.net
text:
the lsof included on the 4.2-RELEASE CD (4.2-install.iso) complains
about being compiled for 4.2-BETA.

How-To-Repeat: $ pkg_info | grep lsof
lsof-4.52           Lists information about open files (similar to fstat(1))
$ lsof /mnt
lsof: WARNING: compiled for FreeBSD release 4.2-BETA; this is 4.2-RELEASE.
$
